title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to set up and use Claude Code with Ollama to build a complete agentic AI application locally without paid APIs. The guide covers installation, LLM selection like Qwen 3.5, and building a multi-agent travel booking app with Flask and Python.
